DataSource.SQL:
DECLARE @FilterLen INT = LEN('#FILTER[FilterSet]#');
SELECT fot.Ident ,fot.ID AS FolderTreeID ,fol.[Name] ,NULL AS ParentFolderTreeID ,1 AS [Level]
,itsCom.IconCssClass ,itsCom.ColorCssClass ,'' AS [Description] ,itsKnbAgg.[RowCount] AS ITSMKnowledgeBaseCount FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID AND fol.[State] = @FolderActiveState AND fol.FormIdent = 'ITSMCompany' INNER JOIN usr.ITSMCompany AS itsCom ON itsCom.ID = fol.TableID AND itsCom.[State] != @DeletedState OUTER APPLY ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT itsKnbSetting.ID) AS [RowCount] FROM usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseCommonFolderSubForm AS itsKbcfsf INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting AS itsKnbSetting ON itsKnbSetting.ID = itsKbcfsf.TableID AND itsKnbSetting.[State] != @DeletedState WHERE itsKbcfsf.CommonFolderTreeIdent LIKE fot.Ident + '%' AND itsKbcfsf.[State] != @DeletedState AND itsKbcfsf.FormIdent = 'ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting' ) AS itsKnbAgg WHERE @FilterLen <= 0
UNION ALL
SELECT fot.Ident ,fot.ID AS FolderTreeID ,fol.[Name] ,fot.ParentFolderTreeID ,fot.[Level]
,itsCat.IconCssClass ,itsCat.ColorCssClass ,'' AS [Description] ,itsKnbAgg.[RowCount] AS ITSMKnowledgeBaseCount FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID AND fol.[State] = @FolderActiveState AND fol.FormIdent = 'ITSMCategory' INNER JOIN usr.ITSMCategory AS itsCat ON itsCat.ID = fol.TableID AND itsCat.[State] != @DeletedState OUTER APPLY ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT itsKnbSetting.ID) AS [RowCount] FROM usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseCommonFolderSubForm AS itsKbcfsf INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting AS itsKnbSetting ON itsKnbSetting.ID = itsKbcfsf.TableID AND itsKnbSetting.[State] != @DeletedState WHERE itsKbcfsf.CommonFolderTreeIdent LIKE fot.Ident + '%' AND itsKbcfsf.[State] != @DeletedState AND itsKbcfsf.FormIdent = 'ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting' ) AS itsKnbAgg WHERE fot.ParentFolderTreeID = @CurrentFolderTreeID AND @FilterLen >= 1

DECLARE @FilterLen INT = LEN('#FILTER[FilterSet]#');
SELECT fot.ParentFolderTreeID ,fot.ID FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot WHERE ID = @CurrentFolderTreeID

SELECT itsKnbSetting.ID ,CONCAT(itsKbt.TextValue + ' - ' ,itsKnb.Title) AS Title ,FORMAT(itsKnb.CreateDate, 'dd.MM.yyyy', @UICultureCode) AS CreateDate ,creatorAcc.FullName AS AccountID ,ISNULL(itsKbtSetting.IconCssClass, 'ph-file') AS IconCssClass ,ISNULL(itsKbtSetting.ColorCssClass, 'primary') AS ColorCssClass FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseCommonFolderSubForm AS itsKbcfsf ON itsKbcfsf.CommonFolderTreeIdent = fot.Ident AND itsKbcfsf.[State] != @DeletedState AND itsKbcfsf.FormIdent = 'ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting' INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseSetting AS itsKnbSetting ON itsKnbSetting.ID = itsKbcfsf.TableID AND itsKnbSetting.[State] != @DeletedState INNER JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBase AS itsKnb ON itsKnb.Guid = itsKnbSetting.Guid AND itsKnb.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseTypeSetting AS itsKbtSetting ON itsKbtSetting.Guid = itsKnbSetting.ITSMKnowledgeBaseTypeGuid LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMKnowledgeBaseType AS itsKbt ON itsKbt.Guid = itsKbtSetting.Guid AND itsKbt.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS creatorAcc ON creatorAcc.ID = itsKnb.AccountID WHERE fot.ID = @CurrentFolderTreeID ORDER BY itsKnb.CreateDate DESC

/*#FILTER[FilterSet]#*/
SELECT fotP.ID AS FolderTreeID, fol.[Name] FROM dbo.FolderTree AS fot INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fotP ON fot.Ident LIKE fotP.Ident + '%' INNER JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fotP.FolderID AND fol.[State] = @FolderActiveState WHERE fot.ID = @CurrentFolderTreeID ORDER BY fotP.Level ASC
